backend/main.mo: Main backend actor defining types (UserProfile, Trip, roles, locations) and data structures with Map storage for user profiles and trips, includes AccessControl initialization and helper functions for role checking.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting implemented driver profile editing features including edit button, modal, and form fields (servicePincode, serviceAreaName, vehicleExperience, transmissionComfort, languages) with associated test IDs and file references.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend components including routing with role guards, dashboard pages, profile management, trip lists, forms, and styling with earth-tone OKLCH color system.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS with Tailwind layers defining OKLCH color system variables for light and dark modes using neutral grayscale tones with chart colors in various hues.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Namma Driver Pilot application with root div and module script reference to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main app component with TanStack Router setup, root layout with profile setup modal, and strict role-based route guards that redirect users to appropriate dashboards based on their role (customer/driver/admin).
frontend/src/components/AdminTripsTab.ts: Admin trips table component displaying all trips with searchable pickup/dropoff locations, customer/driver emails from user map lookup, color-coded status badges, and creation timestamps in a scrollable table.
frontend/src/components/AdminUsersTab.ts: Admin component that displays a searchable, filterable table of all users with their email, full name, role (with color-coded badges), and join date. Uses useGetAllUsers hook to fetch data and includes loading states.
frontend/src/components/AvailableTripsSe: Driver-facing component that displays available trip requests in a scrollable list with pickup/dropoff locations and timestamps. Allows drivers to accept trips using the useAcceptTrip mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/CustomerTripList: Customer-facing component that displays a user's trip history in a scrollable list, showing pickup/dropoff locations, status badges with color coding, and creation timestamps. Uses useGetMyTrips hook to fetch data.
frontend/src/components/DriverProfileSec: Displays a driver's profile information including service area, vehicle experience, transmission comfort, languages, and earnings in a card layout. Provides an edit button to open the profile editing modal.
frontend/src/components/DriverTripList.t: Driver-facing component showing accepted trips with pickup/dropoff details, status badges, and a 'Mark as Completed' button for accepted trips. Uses useGetMyTrips and useCompleteTrip hooks.
frontend/src/components/EditDriverProfil: Form component for editing driver profile details including service pincode/area, vehicle experience checkboxes, transmission comfort options, languages, and availability toggle. Submits updates via useSaveCallerUserProfile mutation.
Modal wrapper component that displays the EditDriverProfileForm in a dialog with header and description. Controls open/close state and passes userProfile data to the form.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout wrapper component providing consistent structure with Navigation header, main content area, and footer with copyright and caffeine.ai attribution link. Used across all pages.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Navigation header component that displays app branding, user profile dropdown with role-based dashboard navigation, and logout functionality. Handles routing to different dashboards based on user role (admin/driver/customer).
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog for new user profile creation that collects email and full name, creates a UserProfile with default customer role, and prevents dismissal until completed.
Comprehensive ride booking form supporting local/outstation trips with one-way/round-trip options, manual or GPS-based location input, vehicle type selection, duration/date-time configuration, and contact details. Includes validation and modal dialogs for journey type explanations.
frontend/src/components/RoleSelectionWar: Modal with 60-second countdown that forces users to choose between customer or driver role with a warning that the selection is permanent and cannot be changed. Redirects to appropriate dashboard after role selection.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance based on authentication state, initializing with identity when authenticated or returning anonymous actor otherwise. Invalidates dependent queries when actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetCallerUserProfi: React Query hook that fetches the current authenticated user's profile from the backend actor, with loading states and retry disabled.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout flow, identity persistence, delegation validation, and authentication status states. Includes AuthClient creation with configurable options and idle handling.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend operations including user profile management, trip creation/retrieval, and role-based actions (customer, driver, admin). Handles query caching and invalidation with useActor for authentication.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light/dark themes using earth tones and warm greens. Defines color tokens for UI components (primary, secondary, accent, borders, etc.).
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query client and wraps the app with InternetIdentityProvider and QueryClientProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard page with tabs for managing users and trips. Displays counts and uses AdminUsersTab and AdminTripsTab components.
frontend/src/pages/CustomerDashboard.tsx: Customer dashboard with two-column layout showing RideRequestForm for booking rides and CustomerTripList for viewing trip history.
frontend/src/pages/DriverDashboard.tsx: Driver dashboard with tabs for available trips and accepted trips, includes driver profile section with edit modal functionality.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Landing page with hero section and features, handles login via Internet Identity and redirects authenticated users to appropriate dashboards based on their role.
frontend/src/pages/RoleSelectionPage.tsx: Role selection page for new users to choose between Customer and Driver roles, displays role cards with features and automatically shows warning modal about permanent role selection.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage integration for parameter persistence across navigation.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom theme extensions including OKLCH color system, container settings, border radius variables, custom animations (accordion), and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state document for 'Namma Driver Pilot' ride-booking MVP using React/Vite frontend and Supabase backend with role-based access (customer/driver/admin), RLS policies, and existing features for authentication, dashboards, and trip management.
